# FocusFlow AI — Clarity Code by Coach Kay

> Master-certified clarity coaching by Coach Kay. AI-guided clarity sessions, programs, and the Story, Legacy & Publishing Studio to help you see clearly and move with purpose.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of FocusFlow AI and Coach Kay's clarity coaching approach.
- [Clarity Session](/clarity): One-question AI-guided clarity session that delivers a personalized insight.
- [Assessment](/assessment): Clarity assessment to identify where you're stuck and what to do next.
- [Programs](/programs): Coaching programs built on the F.O.C.U.S. pillars.
- [Studio](/store): Story, Legacy & Publishing Studio — books, packages, and inquiry lanes (including Autism & Social Stories).
- [Autism & Social Stories](/autism-social-stories): Therapist-grade custom social stories for autistic kids and neurodivergent families. HSA/FSA eligible with Letter of Medical Necessity template included. Packages from $47 (single digital story) to $3,997+ (custom therapy practice license). Used by BCBAs, SLPs, OTs, LPCs, and school/IEP teams. Gift-wrap add-on available.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Authenticated user dashboard with clarity score, streaks, and enrolled programs.
- [Community](/community): Focus Flow Elevation Hub community access.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions grouped by lane — coaching, Rent-an-Agent, advisory, audit, autism & social stories, and the publishing studio. Each lane carries its own FAQPage JSON-LD for AI search.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, tiers, and one-time purchases.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your account.
- [Signup](/signup): Create a new account.

## About

FocusFlow AI is Coach Kay's clarity coaching platform. Everything maps to one
framework: **F.O.C.U.S.** — five transformational pillars that every module,
challenge, assessment, and coaching session traces back to.

- **F — Foundation:** identity, mindset, inner work
- **O — Opportunity:** vision, direction, strategic clarity
- **C — Create:** aligned action and intentional building
- **U — Uplift:** standards, habits, environment
- **S — Support:** community, accountability, ongoing coaching

It combines AI-guided sessions, structured programs, and a publishing studio
to help people get unstuck, make decisions, and build a legacy.
